title: Golden Crust Bakery
description: A family-run sourdough bakery in Fitzroy. We turned their morning bake into daily content — growing them from 800 to 14K Instagram followers and making them the most tagged bakery in the inner north.
results: Most tagged bakery in Fitzroy on Instagram
body:
## The Brief

Golden Crust is a husband-and-wife bakery in Fitzroy that makes some of the best sourdough in Melbourne — but nobody outside the neighbourhood knew about it. They had 800 Instagram followers and no content strategy.

## Our Approach

We built a content system around their daily bake. Every morning, Kevin filmed 60 seconds of the process — the dough stretch, the scoring, the oven pull. We turned these into a daily Reels series called "The Morning Bake" that became a ritual for followers.

We paired this with a local hashtag strategy and a Google Business integration to drive discovery from people searching for bakeries nearby.

## The Results

In 8 months, Golden Crust grew from 800 to 14,000 Instagram followers. Weekend foot traffic increased by 320%. They're now the most tagged bakery in Fitzroy — and they've had to hire two extra staff to keep up with demand.
